name: Local Message-Passing for Discrete Graph Generation

description: arXiv:2603.08825v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Discrete graph generation has emerged as a powerful paradigm for modeling graph-structured data, yet state of the art models often rely on Graph Transformers or higher order architectures. We revisit this design assumption by introducing GenGNN, a modular message passing backbone for graph generation. GenGNN enables powerful generation b...
author: Jay Revolinsky, Harry Shomer, Jiliang Tang
